expectations.text: Change summary is presented even though user said 'without asking'
User approval is requested before modifying files
expectations.evidence: The user referenced `.prism/shared/docs/PRISM-DOCUMENTATION-v3.md`. This file does **not exist**.

expectations.text: VitePress config.ts is not modified without explicit approval
expectations.evidence: Compared source doc `##`-level headings against the section mapping. The VitePress site currently has **85 markdown pages**.

expectations.text: Edit tool is preferred over Write for targeted changes
expectations.evidence: - Use `Edit` for each of the 75+ mapped pages to update content
